messages.text: line 3 labeler is down again, controller is flashing E-42
that's the label web jam at the peel tip. did you lock it out first before reaching in?
not yet, was about to open the applicator
do NOT reach in live. lock the electrical disconnect, close and lock the air supply, then bleed residual air to 0 psi at the regulator gauge. that's SOP-1190 LOTO. E-42 won't clear safely otherwise
ok locked out and bled to zero. opened the peel tip and there was a chewed label wrapped around the roller
classic E-42. clear the jam, reseat the web through the peel tip per the threading diagram, then remove LOTO and power back up
cleared, rethreaded, ran 50 labels clean. line 3 back up. thanks
nice. if it recurs same shift, check the peel tip wear, that roller was due for replacement
